transcript.text:
Arre, hello! Welcome to our clinic. 

Kya aapka naam hai? (What's your name?)
Arre bhai, welcome to clinic. Kya aapka naam hai? (What's your name?)
Krish ji, aapka naam note kar liya hai (I have noted your name). Aap ka caller ID match karta hai (Your caller ID matches yours)?
Aap new patient hain ya existing patient (Are you a new patient or existing patient)?
